title: Amtech - 4-Size Interchangeable Brick Jointer Tool for Maintaining and Repairing Brickwork, Durable Cast Aluminium, Ergonomic Handle, Includes Nylon Storage Pouch (13mm, 16mm, 19mm, 22mm)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: ERGONOMIC: This brick jointer set has a durable, cast aluminium, ergonomically designed handle with increased knuckle room for ease of use
4 INTERCHANGEABLE BARRELS: It has 4 sizes of interchangeable steel barrels: 13mm (1/2"), 16mm (5/8"), 19mm (3/4") and 22mm (7/8")
STORAGE POUCH: The kit is supplied in a handy storage pouch
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: From the manufacturer Why Amtech? Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your hand tools requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product assurance. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Aluminium Handle The jointer has an aluminium handle that makes the product strong and durable. The handle design also has an ergonomic shape that makes for comfortable handling. Various Sizes You will find different interchangeable sizes of jointer barrels included: 1/2”, 5/8”, 3/4” and 7/8”. Use any barrel based on your requirements. Storage Case You can store the brick jointer in a handy storage pouch when not in use, keeping it safe and secure.
